subcodes.first_line: O Haydar! Upon thee be My Glory! Hearken unto My Call, for verily it draweth thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حیدر علیک بهائی اسمع ندائی انه یجذبک الی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @thankfulness; gratitude, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @service to others; to the Cause of God
